creator: daniel@octaforge.org
text:
With Firefox (latest) and nspluginwrapper (latest) after yesterday's 11-CURRENT update (from SVN), flash started doing this:

*** NSPlugin Viewer  *** ERROR: ERROR: Failed to listen on socket.: Invalid argument
*** NSPlugin Wrapper *** ERROR: failed to initialize plugin-side RPC client connection

This keeps repeating in the terminal for a while, and then it decides to give up and works correctly.

I use binary packages from pkg (but I tried compiling nspluginwrapper from ports too and it made no difference). Before yesterday's update it worked fine.
